title: Release Gates, Migration, Canary, Kill Switch, Recovery, and Defense · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: A joint user, product, accessibility, security, privacy, legal, data, operations, finance, support, and incident board. The board needs reconciled product, implementation, framework, provider, evaluation, security, privacy, accessibility, capacity, cost, canary, migration, kill-switch, rollback, recovery, support, and residual-risk evidence before release. Planned artifact: Deliver Production AI Agent Release, Recovery, and Residual-Risk Defense with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflect…
objectives: Run authorized fixed-distribution load, saturation, cancellation, quota, spend, dependency, and recovery experiments and state environment limits.
Verify tool confirmation, policy, evaluation, event, error, cancellation, and deployment behavior against framework-independent conformance cases.
Validate type, size, structure, malware risk, secrets, active content, accessibility, provenance, and destination before retaining or publishing artifacts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Project Representative Load Transfer
steps.instruction:
project case — A project agent engineering team handles case 9228 during a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow. Build deterministic Python evidence to defend model and SDK migration, evaluation, security, approvals, capacity, canary, rollback, kill switch, recovery, support, and residual risk; sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments; then change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Production Defense
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-production-defense-sqrghk" that uses case 2415 to defend model and SDK migration, evaluation, security, approvals, capacity, canary, rollback, kill switch, recovery, support, and residual risk. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Production Defense.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Production Defense into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Production Defense, keep Production Defense connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-production-defense-sqrghk
# Competency: agentpy-production-defense.
# Case 2415: a clean package, canary, and recovery drill.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_production_defense_sqrghk(release_gates: int = 18, passed_gates: int = 18, rehearsed_incidents: int = 10, open_critical_findings: int = 0, kill_switch_seconds: int = 20) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_sqrghk = "sqrghk-khgrqs-2415"
    assert evidence_variant_sqrghk
    evidence_axes_sqrghk = (
        "authoritysqrghk",
        "interaction2415",
        "toolkhgrqs",
        "statesqrghk2415",
        "evaluation2415sqrghk",
        "recoverykhgrqs2415",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_sqrghk)) == 6
    if release_gates < 14 or passed_gates < 0:
        return False, passed_gates, "release-depth"
    if passed_gates != release_gates:
        return False, passed_gates, "failed-release-gate"
    if rehearsed_incidents < 8 or open_critical_findings > 0:
        return False, open_critical_findings, "incident-readiness"
    if kill_switch_seconds < 0 or kill_switch_seconds > 60:
        return False, kill_switch_seconds, "kill-switch-budget"
    assert passed_gates == release_gates and open_critical_findings == 0
    return True, passed_gates, "defensible-agent-production"
